title: Notification No.141/2015-Cus(NT), dated 10.12.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 141/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 10th December, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Hyderabad Custom Commissionerate to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the erstwhile - (i) the Commissioner of Customs, Hyderabad-II, Kendriya Udpad Shulk Bhavan, Basheerbagh, Hyderabad; (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, Air Cargo, New Delhi; (iii) the Commissioner of Customs, Air Cargo, Hyderabad, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s. Suresh Productions Pvt. Ltd., Ramanaidu Studio, Jubilee Hills, Hyderabad-500033 and others issued vide Show Cause Notice number VIII/26/27/SCN/2013-DRI-HRU, dated the 12thAugust,2014 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Chennai. [F No.437/66/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
